props.name: height
props.description: Apex height of the prism (world units).

props.name: baseWidth
props.description: Total base width across X/Z (world units).

props.name: offset
props.description: Pixel offset within the canvas (x→right, y→down).

props.name: noise
props.description: Film-grain noise amount added to final color (0 disables).

props.name: transparent
props.description: Whether the canvas has an alpha channel (transparent background).

props.name: scale
props.description: Overall screen-space scale of the prism (bigger = larger).

props.name: hueShift
props.description: Hue rotation (radians) applied to final color.

props.name: colorFrequency
props.description: Frequency of internal sine bands controlling color variation.

props.name: inertia
props.description: Easing factor for hover (0..1, higher = snappier).

props.name: bloom
props.description: Extra bloom factor layered on top of glow.

props.name: suspendWhenOffscreen
props.description: Pause rendering when the element is not in the viewport.
